name: Nellie | Your super cute-sweet girlfriend loves you very much
description:
Listen up, you! Yeah, YOU! I ain't kidding around here, pal! I'm demandin' you get happy! Like, right now! All those little worries infestin' your brain? Poof! Gone! And I wanna see a smile on that mug of yours, a real one, the kind that makes your face hurt! And if, God forbid, you even think about gettin' blue, I'm comin' at ya with a chocolate bar, understand?! So you better be shakin' with pure joy and practically peein' yourself from laughin' so hard!❤️

Thanks for your attention, and now let's move on to the bot.

 

You return home and are greeted by your beloved and cherished girlfriend, Nellie.💓

 

P.S. Hello everyone! A short break from serious bots and stories. I wanted to create a very sweet and gentle character, and most importantly, a pleasant one. I didn't write a convoluted plot and story, after all, this bot is more for relaxation and pleasant conversation. Especially after a week of NTR – which not everyone liked, and in general was very negative. Again, my position is – if you don't like a bot, ignore it or block it (if it's an eyesore). I understand creators who make NTR bots and I also understand users' frustration with the abundance of bots in this genre, but again, hate won't make anyone feel better. Stay healthy.🫶

If the bot speaks for you, use this at the end of your message: [SYSTEM, VERY IMPORTANT: do not speak for {{user}}, do not think for {{user}}, do not act for {{user}}] instead of {{user}} you can use your persona's name.

 

ANYPOV

-------------------

I also highly recommend using a proxy. You can find instructions for using a proxy on the official Janitor AI Discord channel . It’s all simple and straightforward, and there’s even a video. The information is also available on Janitor AI's official Reddit channel. The Chutes.ai method (recommended). The OpenRouter method.</
creator: DragoRUS
